display.name: Broken Guard Hut
display.short_description: A watch hut has slumped into the roadside ditch. One wall still holds against the wind, and a collapsed shield rack shows a glint under the dust.

choices.label: Search the shield rack
choices.summary: Pry one last usable fitting out from the rotten boards before the whole rack folds over.

choices.label: Wait under the eaves
choices.summary: Take one short dry minute under the leaning roof and let the sting go out of your ribs.
